title: Tevlaphee Steering Wheel Lock, Steering Lock, Car Steering Wheel Locks, Steering Wheel to Seat Belt Lock, High Visibility Car Lock Anti-Theft Device, Heavy Duty, Universal Fit, 3Keys (Red)
features: 🔐【DOUBLE ANTI-THEFT】Lock the steering wheel and seat belt socket at the same time, double anti-theft, the anti-theft effect is better than simply locking the steering wheel

🔐【UPGRADED MATERIALS】The inner high-performance braided steel cable provides excellent resistance to cutting and sawing. The steel cable is wrapped in scratch-resistant material to avoid scratching the steering wheel
🔐【VISUAL DETERRENT】The outermost layer is wrapped in nylon cover with bright color, which is bright enough to be seen at night to warn thieves to stay away from your car
🔐【EASY TO USE】Compatible with most vehicles on the market, it is very easy to use and takes only seconds to install and unlock
🔐【EASY TO STORE】Small and lightweight, it does not take up space and can be stored in the storage box in the car
description: Product Description Tevlaphee Steering Wheel Lock, Steering Wheel to Seat Belt Lock Car thefts are frequent now, do you often worry about the safety of your car? Having a trusted anti-theft tool is essential. Our Tevlaphee Steering Wheel Lock Can Solve Your Worries! PACKAGE INCLUDES : 1 x Steering Wheel Lock; 3 x Keys; 1 x Product Manual Previous page HIGH SAFETY FACTOR Tevlaphee team collected customer needs and developed this new and upgraded steering wheel lock, which locks the steering wheel and seat belt socket at the same time, you can use it with confidence! HIGH ANTI-THEFT PERFORMANCE Using Class B+ lock core, the structure of the lock core is complex and difficult for professional thieves to crack. The key is double-sided and double row, with low mutual opening rate. Next page THICKEND STEEL CABLE, STRONG ANTI-THEFT The thick braided steel cable has excellent resistance to cutting and sawing, keeping your car safe! DURABLE LOCK The locking mechanism is made of high-quality steel, and even violence cannot make it bend. Its security is several times higher than others. NO SCRATCH Wrapped with PVC. It can prevent wear and tear on the steering wheel. GOOD WORKMANSHIP Fine edge stitching, tight lines, and long service life. NYLON COVER The nylon cover is brightly colored and can be easily noticed by people outside the car. VISUAL DETERRENT The outermost layer is wrapped in nylon cover with bright color, which is bright enough to be seen at night to warn thieves to stay away from your car! EASY TO STORE Our steering wheel lock is easily rolled up and stored in the glove box, seat pocket, driver's door storage box, or center console. It won't take up too much space in your car. Previous page Rotate about 30° clockwise. Press the key down. Pull the lock out of the seat belt socket. The MAX usage length is 22 " . Compatible with most vehicles on the market.
